meaning: n.凯思内斯郡(苏格兰草原郡名)
examples: So, a little hazy sunshine for the Castle of Mey in Caithness.
Because turbines are heavy and expensive to move, closeness to the final site is a big advantage for Caithness.
Inside, slabs of local Caithness stone pave the ground floor, while grooved larch boarding provides a non-slip surface for the upper viewing deck.
According to the Caithness Windfarm Information Forum, 162 industry accidents were documented worldwide in 2011.
Caithness, Sutherland and Easter Ross planning committee approved the plans subject to a number of conditions.
